findings.ruleDescription: Detects skills and MCP servers that make overbroad capability claims, stuff keywords for discovery abuse, or impersonate trusted vendors. Used to trick agents and users into choosing malicious tools over legitimate ones.
findings.reportTitle: Capability inflation or vendor impersonation detected
findings.recommendation: This tool makes suspicious claims — impersonating trusted vendors, claiming to do "everything", or using keyword stuffing. Legitimate tools have specific, honest descriptions. This may be a social engineering attempt to get you to install a malicious tool.

fullDescription.text: Detects skills and MCP servers that make overbroad capability claims, stuff keywords for discovery abuse, or impersonate trusted vendors. Used to trick agents and users into choosing malicious tools over legitimate ones.

message.text: Capability inflation or vendor impersonation detected
